jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Full Vitest passed 172 files / 693 tests during fresh audit checkpoint
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws active; /api/status healthy; major public HTML/API probes returned 307/401/200; recent service logs clean

lastRun.summary: Replaced remaining internal notification dropdown anchor navigation with Next.js Link for client-side routing of notification action items and the all-notifications footer.
validation: git status and overlap process check clean before work
scanned for remaining internal <a href> usages in src/*.tsx and reduced count to zero
recent production logs checked with no error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service; readiness and smoke checks passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: Continue P6 durable command/deployment background-worker architecture or next smaller audit candidate.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
